sections.name: sustained_over_motion
sections.notes: Syncopated melody with swing over slow, sustained half-time chords. The voices should breathe independently.

sections.name: chords_drive_melody_floats
sections.notes: Flip: driving eighth-note chords underneath a spacious half-time melody. Chords push while melody floats.

sections.name: unison_lockstep
sections.notes: No harmony_rhythm override - melody and harmony lock together on purpose for the ending. Contrast with the independence before it.
